brief_summary: Github Issue Templates. You were right to push back. Live status for [PR #758](https://github.com/livepeer/docs/pull/758) after I pushed your merge commit: - `mergeStateStatus`: `BLOCKED` (not `DIRTY` anymore) - So it is no longer merge-conflicted; it is now blocked by require...
